interactions.body:
(Borrower GT Rule 1 Email) [RE:A cosigner is your key to $3000] Hi Julia, 

Thanks for reaching out, we understand that it can seem difficult to find a cosigner at first. Don't worry though, we help people like you every day!

We're a cosigner lender, all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them. A cosigner is a great sign that someone trusts you, and that we should too regardless of your credit history! If your cosigner trusts you, then we will.

A cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor or even a colleague) who is a US resident, has a 750+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time - someone who owns their home or pays a mortgage is much more likely to be accepted. Remember, as long as you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to make a payment! You might find some useful tips on how to approach finding or speaking to a potential cosigner here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans

When you have found someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/CBSIRG5A - we'd love for your loan to add to the $100 million we've already paid out to people just like you. If you still find that you're not able to find a cosigner, please respond to this email with CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else.

Thanks, 
Jade@Transform Credit

interactions.body:
(CB - What is this? Email) [RE:CreditBuilder Payment Reminder] Hi Tammy,
 
Thanks for getting in touch.
 
I can see that on 12/26/2024 you signed up for a CreditBuilder account AND applied for a $5000 loan. This involved providing your bank account details and electronically signing the CreditBuilder Loan Agreement on our website.

When you sign up for CreditBuilder, you take the first step in building your score over 1-2 years. Each month you pay $5 toward a loan that is held on your behalf, which we report to the Credit Bureaus as an on time payment. These successful payments build up your credit history, helping to improve your score. Once the loan term is completed, or if you decide to cancel/stop paying, your CreditBuilder account is simply marked as paid in full. This prevents any missed payments from undoing the positive impact that your on-time payments have on your credit score.

CreditBuilder is a fantastic stepping stone towards seeing the benefits of an improving credit score, without the responsibility of taking on a big financial commitment. When you do find yourself ready, with the help of a co-signer, TransformCredit can help you access funds too! At which point, any CreditBuilder loan you have will be paid in full on your behalf.

You can find out more about the benefits of Transform CreditBuilder here - transformcredit.com/transform-credit-builder/. You can also login and manage your account, view your payments and cancel here: https://transformcredit.com/CBServicing/login, or reply 'CANCEL' to this email.

To continue with your $5000 loan application, follow this link to pick up where you left off: https://tcrdt.com/s/PQ4B2WM8

If you need help, please let me know
 
Have a great day, 
Jade @ Transform CreditBuilder

interactions.body: Hi Marva, Thank you for reaching out. We are not sure what made you feel that way. I can assure you that we do not scam or defraud our customers. We help hundreds of customers daily build up their credit score by offering cosigner loans and our Credit builder account. Our processes all follow applicable State and Federal laws and legislations that are applicable to our organization. Furthermore, Transform Credit Inc., DBA Together Loans, is registered with the Nationwide Multistate Licensing System (NMLS), with license number 1905055. We welcome you to confirm this information on the NMLS website yourself: https://www.nmlsconsumeraccess.org/ We have annual state audits to maintain our licenses, and if there were any significant issues, we would be unable to lend. However, given your message, just to confirm, we have canceled your loan application. If you wish to reapply in the future, please visit: https://togetherloans.com/. I'm sorry we were unable to assist you on this occasion. Have a nice day, Together Loans

interactions.body:
[Your TransformCredit Loan Application : *****************92806] Hi Diana,

Thank you for contacting Transform Credit, your message is really important to us.

I can see that your application is active and you still have some tasks to finish before the loan is paid. Your current application contemplates a loan of $3000, over 24 months, paying back $177.13 monthly, but you can change these terms anytime before the loan is paid.

Transform Credit is a cosigner-based lender.  This means all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them, regardless of the loan that you're applying for and your credit score. Normally, a cosigner is a friend or a family member who knows you (the borrower) and trusts that it is a good idea for you to borrow money. A suitable cosigner is someone who has a credit score of more than 750 and a strong history of paying their bills on time. Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time.

How does the application journey work? When you apply online, we will send you a unique link for your cosigner to register. As soon as we have everything we need from both of you, we’ll transfer the money. The money is transferred into your cosigner's account. This is to protect them, and us, against identity fraud, as transferring the money into their account ensures that they are fully aware of the loan.

You can check here more information about the application journey and common questions: https://transformcredit.com/faq 

To complete your application journey and check what is the next step, you can use this link: https://tcrdt.com/s/7M5JZJ9S

Any other questions, please let me know.

Have a nice day,
Michael@TransformCredit

[Your TransformCredit Loan Application : *****************00100] Hi Roger,

Thank you for contacting Transform Credit, your message is really important to us. We have updated your phone number per your request.

I can see that your application is active and you still have some tasks to finish before the loan is paid. Your current application contemplates a loan of $4250, over 24 months, paying back $237.62 monthly, but you can change these terms anytime before the loan is paid.

Transform Credit is a cosigner-based lender.  This means all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them, regardless of the loan that you're applying for and your credit score. Normally, a cosigner is a friend or a family member who knows you (the borrower) and trusts that it is a good idea for you to borrow money. A suitable cosigner is someone who has a credit score of more than 750 and a strong history of paying their bills on time. Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time.

How does the application journey work? When you apply online, we will send you a unique link for your cosigner to register. As soon as we have everything we need from both of you, we’ll transfer the money. The money is transferred into your cosigner's account. This is to protect them, and us, against identity fraud, as transferring the money into their account ensures that they are fully aware of the loan.

You can check here more information about the application journey and common questions: https://transformcredit.com/faq 

To complete your application journey and check what is the next step, you can use this link: https://tcrdt.com/s/NR5Y0UYI

Any other questions, please let me know.

Have a nice day,
Laura@TransformCredit

(Borrower GT Rule 1 Email) [RE:Your Transform Credit Loan Application Ref: *****************00100] Hi Roger, 

Thanks for reaching out, we understand that it can seem difficult to find a cosigner at first. Don't worry though, we help people like you every day!

We're a cosigner lender, all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them. A cosigner is a great sign that someone trusts you, and that we should too regardless of your credit history! If your cosigner trusts you, then we will.

A cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor or even a colleague) who is a US resident, has a 700+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time - someone who owns their home or pays a mortgage is much more likely to be accepted. Remember, as long as you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to make a payment! You might find some useful tips on how to approach finding or speaking to a potential cosigner here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans

When you have found someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/7YHUEXGT - we'd love for your loan to add to the $100 million we've already paid out to people just like you. If you still find that you're not able to find a cosigner, please respond to this email with CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else.

Thanks, 
Jade@Transform Credit

interactions.body: (AI BW GTQs - Thanks for letting us know SMS) Hi Alvin, thanks for letting us know. Take as long as you need, we'll keep your application open. When you're ready to continue, continue your application here: https://tcrdt.com/s/XXXGPAT6 If you need to invite a cosigner, have them follow this link: https://tcrdt.com/s/EZY23DNB Reply CANCEL to unsubscribe. Thanks, Together Loans

(AI BW PRODQs - App update - declined GT SMS) Hi Alvin, unfortunately your cosigner wasn't suitable at this time, as they didn't meet our internal criteria. We can't share specific reasons with you due to data protection, but we've sent them an email explaining our decision. Don't worry though, your application is still approved! You just need to provide a different cosigner. A good cosigner should have a credit score of 750+ and a history of paying bills on time. Someone who owns their home or pays a mortgage is more likely to be accepted. Add a new cosigner here: https://tcrdt.com/s/EZY23DNB Thanks, Together Loans

(Borrower GT Default SMS) Hi Alvin, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, and we should too! They can be ANYONE who is a US resident, has 700+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! You'll find tips here: https://togetherloans.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/EZY23DNB - we'd love your loan to add to the +$100 million we've already paid out. If you still can't find a cosigner, please respond CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Jade, Together Loans

Suitable cosigners have a credit score of 750+ and a history of paying bills on time. Homeowners don't usually need a score as high as 750 and anyone with over a 700 score has a fair chance of being accepted. If you're unsure if your cosigner will be accepted, ask them to complete their application online, and they will be informed if they are accepted. interactions.body:
(Appeals Auto Response BRW Email) [RE:Missing Subject] Hi Rachel, 

Thanks for contacting Appeals. 

We understand that it can be disheartening when you're struggling to find a suitable cosigner, don't worry though - the most important thing is we've already accepted your application and want to help you.

There are a few reasons we could find someone to be unsuitable - the most common being a less than perfect credit history. It will be up to your cosigner to make any loan payments that you do not, looking at their Experian credit history allows us to check that they can manage this in addition to their existing commitments. If a potential cosigner has missed or late payments, we can't be certain they'd be able to afford the loan payments while maintaining their other accounts. Alternatively, If your potential cosigner's credit file is locked, we won't have been able to confirm either way (they can apply as soon as their credit file is unlocked: https://tcrdt.com/s/EJT0QNLD). 

When you're considering who to ask, remember your cosigner must have a 750+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time (homeowners and mortgage payers are more likely to be accepted). It's important to remember that your cosigner can only be on one TransformCredit loan at a time too.

If you've provided someone who is unsure why they weren't accepted, we recommend they check their Experian credit report/score for free at: https://www.experian.com/.

In the meantime, the $4500 will still be reserved for you. We'd love for your loan to add to the $100 million we've already paid out to people just like you. Give this link to your cosigner to register online: https://tcrdt.com/s/EJT0QNLD and feel free to check out our FAQs for further help: https://transformcredit.com/faq.

Jade@TransformCredit 

P.S. I am ready to pay $4500 out within 24 hours of your cosigner being approved, but if you don't plan to provide a new cosigner please let me know by replying CANCEL so I can reserve it for someone else

interactions.body: Hi Angela. Take as long as you need, I will keep your application open for you, and when you are ready to continue, you can use this link: https://tcrdt.com/s/74E1DVXO If you still don't have a cosigner, remember that a suitable cosigner is someone who has a credit score of more than 750 and a good history of paying their bills on time - homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time. Most of our customers ask a close friend or family member to be their cosigner because they know and trust you the most. If you have more questions, please let us know. Thanks, Transform Credit

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 SMS) Hi Kiara, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, so we should too! They can be ANYONE who has a 700+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Homeowners with slightly lower scores will also have a good chance of approval. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! Find tips here: https://togetherloans.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/FQYS7N6N - we'd love to add you to the 40,000 customers we have already helped like you. If you still can't find a cosigner, please reply CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Ben, Together Loans

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 SMS) Hi Raven, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, and we should too! They can be ANYONE who is a US resident, has 750+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! You'll find tips here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/HNLGSB43 - we'd love your loan to add to the +$100 million we've already paid out. If you still can't find a cosigner, please respond CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Jade, Transform Credit

Thanks for choosing Transform Credit, we have attached your Proposed Credit Contract with this email for you to keep. This does not mean that your application has been approved, but it gives you a chance to read and understand the terms of the agreement. 

Below is a link where you can view/download our free Credit Education Program. You're not required to do anything with this in order to proceed with your application but we do recommend reviewing the content as you may find it helpful.
https://transformcredit.com/credit-education-program?state=ca

To finalize your application please complete all of the required steps online -  https://tcrdt.com/s/7Z60N0AD

If you have any questions about our application process please visit our website https://transformcredit.com/faq

Amber @ Transform Credit

interactions.body:
[Affordability Confirmation] To Alex ******,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Information provided to Transform Credit by you:

Borrower: Alex ******
IP: 172.56.187.245
DateTime (UTC): 12-14-2024
Stated Monthly Income: Full Time Employed $4600
Rent: $850
Bills: $300
Other Expenses: $350
Your Credit Commitments: $60
Transform Credit Repayment: $177.130000
To be safe: $50
Total available after expenditure and this loan repayment: $2812.870000


Yours sincerely
Transform credit Applications Dept

interactions.body:
(Borrower GT Rule 1 Email) [RE:Need help finding a cosigner?] Hi Martin, 

Thanks for reaching out, we understand that it can seem difficult to find a cosigner at first. Don't worry though, we help people like you every day!

We're a cosigner lender, all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them. A cosigner is a great sign that someone trusts you, and that we should too regardless of your credit history! If your cosigner trusts you, then we will.

A cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor or even a colleague) who is a US resident, has a 700+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time - someone who owns their home or pays a mortgage is much more likely to be accepted. Remember, as long as you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to make a payment! You might find some useful tips on how to approach finding or speaking to a potential cosigner here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans

When you have found someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/R32WYPFL - we'd love for your loan to add to the $100 million we've already paid out to people just like you. If you still find that you're not able to find a cosigner, please respond to this email with CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else.

Thanks, 
Jade@Transform Credit

(Borrower Cancellation Email) [RE:Need help finding a cosigner?] Hi Martin. Just to confirm we have canceled your loan application. If you wish to reapply in the future, please visit: https://transformcredit.com/ James, Transform Credit

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Default SMS) Hi Ryan, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, and we should too! The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to charges of criminal fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 SMS) Hi Sandra, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, and we should too! They can be ANYONE who is a US resident, has 750+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! You'll find tips here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/VUYOVZOR - we'd love your loan to add to the +$100 million we've already paid out. If you still can't find a cosigner, please respond CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Jade, Transform Credit

interactions.body:
(AI CB ORANGE Email) [RE: Taking money out of my account] Hi Benjamin,

Thanks for getting in touch.

When you applied for a loan with us, we offered two different products: Loans up to $10,000 with a co-signer, and CreditBuilder which is a small loan held on our customer's behalf that customers make monthly payments against, building up their credit score.

I can see that you signed up for a Together Loans CreditBuilder account when applying for a loan of $5000, on 11/24/2025. We sent you a ‘Welcome to Credit Builder' email on sign-up, confirming your account, how it works and how you can manage it.

Your CreditBuilder helps build your credit, even if you do not borrow from us. When you sign up for CreditBuilder, you take the first step in building your score over 1-2 years. Each month you pay $5, which we report to the Credit Bureaus as interest against a loan that is held on your behalf. These successful payments build up your credit history, helping to improve your score. Once the loan term is completed, or if you decide to cancel/stop paying, CreditBuilder is simply marked as paid in full. This prevents any missed payments from undoing the positive impact that your on-time payments have on your credit score.

You can find out more about CreditBuilder here: https://togetherloans.com/together-loans-credit-builder/ or manage your account yourself here, by logging in with your SSN and email: https://togetherloans.com/CBServicing/login. If you wish to cancel at any point, just go to settings to do so and we'll mark the loan as settled on your behalf.

CreditBuilder is a fantastic stepping stone towards seeing the benefits of an improving credit score, without the responsibility of taking on a big financial commitment. When you do find yourself ready, with the help of a co-signer, Together Loans can still help you access funds of up to $10,000 too! At which point, the CreditBuilder loan you have will be paid in full on your behalf.

If you need help, please let me know.

Many thanks,
Ben, Together Loans

(Borrower GT Default Email) [RE:Need help finding a cosigner?] Hi Jennifer, 

Here at Transform Credit, we only offer cosigner loans. Providing a cosigner means we're able to lend to you, even if your credit score is below 500. If your cosigner trusts you then we will too. Your cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor, colleague or even your in-laws!) who:

- Is a US resident
- Is over 23 
- Has a credit score of more than 700
- Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time.
- Trusts you and will pay if you do not 
- Will give correct contact details and sign the agreement

More information about our cosigner requirements can be found here: https://transformcredit.com/faq. Send this link to your cosigner so they can register online in 2 minutes: https://tcrdt.com/s/F0JLGJF8

If you are not able to find a cosigner, please let me know by responding to this email with "CANCEL". You can reapply at any time by visiting: https://transformcredit.com

Thanks,
Transform Credit

[Affordability Confirmation] To Phillip ******,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Default SMS) Hi Phillip, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, and we should too! They can be ANYONE who is a US resident, has 750+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! You'll find tips here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/YSE82EBH - we'd love your loan to add to the +$100 million we've already paid out. If you still can't find a cosigner, please respond CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Jade, Transform Credit

interactions.body:
(AI CB RED - No refund Email) [RE: CreditBuilder Payment Reminder] Hi Lia,

Thank you for reaching out.

When you applied for a loan with us, we offered two different products: Loans up to $10,000 with a co-signer, and CreditBuilder which is a small loan held on our customer's behalf that customers make monthly payments against, building up their credit score.

The CreditBuilder is offered to everyone that applies for a loan with us, and our customers will have the choice to sign up or not sign up for the CreditBuilder loan, as part of the application process. I can see that on 05/25/2024, when you applied for this loan of $7000, you also reached the page where the CreditBuilder product was explained and offered, and you chose to sign up when clicked on “ok, set up my account”.

After signing up, we immediately sent you a “Welcome to Transform CreditBuilder!” email, confirming your account, and further explaining the benefits of the product you had opted into. I can see this was sent to you at 05/25/2024 to lia.******@gmail.com. The email also provided you with your login link, so you could access your account and manage/cancel it, at any time, even before the first payment.

When you signed up for CreditBuilder, you took the first step in building your score. Each month you pay $5, we report these payments to the Credit Bureaus as interest against the loan that has been held on your behalf. These successful payments build your credit history, helping to improve your score. The great thing about CreditBuilder is that if you decide to cancel/stop paying, CreditBuilder is simply marked as paid in full and so missed payments can never undo the positive impact that your on-time payments have been making on your credit score. Our customers use CreditBuilder as a fantastic stepping stone towards seeing the benefits of an improving credit score, without the responsibility of taking on a big financial commitment.

Since 05/25/2024, we’ve sent you monthly payment reminders to your email address above, reminding you that your $5 CreditBuilder payment was due. These reminders again provided you with your login details, where you were able to manage or cancel your CreditBuilder, should you have decided you no longer wanted to benefit from the product. We’ve also been reporting the CreditBuilder loan to Experian, demonstrating any payments you have made. As these on-time payments accumulate, they contribute positively to your overall credit score, paving the way for better credit opportunities in the future.

Based on the above, we will be unable to issue you a refund for the payments that you made during this period. You chose to actively benefit from the product during this time, despite us being open and honest in all of our messages about your CreditBuilder account; including giving you the opportunity to close this at any point in time.

However, your Credit Builder account is now canceled and will now be marked as paid and settled on your credit report. Once again, please rest assured that you do not and never have owed us any money under this Credit Builder loan.

Many thanks,
Ben, Transform Credit

[Your TransformCredit Loan Application : *****************30126] Hi Lia,

Thank you for reaching back out.

As previously explained, we believe we acted in line with your instructions during your loan application with us. We provided you with all the relevant information you needed to manage, or even cancel, your CreditBuilder account, along with the benefits of the product you opted into. 

I can confirm that we have already canceled your CreditBuilder account. You will no longer be charged for this service. 

Please let me know if you have any other questions.

Thanks, 
Eden@TransformCredit

Hello Miguel, 
I'm sorry, but Amelia wasn't a suitable cosigner at this time. We have a responsibility to make sure that cosigning your loan is something that they would be able to financially support and based on the information provided we don't feel that this is the case for them. But we've already accepted your application and want to help you get the money you need - you just need to find someone else to be your cosigner instead. A good cosigner has a credit score of 750+, and a good history of paying their bills on time. Homeowners (not tenants) are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time
To continue with your loan application, please use this link: https://tcrdt.com/s/NGMNMHRQ
Thank you, 
Together Loans

[Affordability Confirmation] To Porfilio ******,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Information provided to Transform Credit by you:

IP: 67.198.73.177

interactions.body:
(Borrower GT Rule 1 Email) [RE:You asked us to help with $3000 - and we can!] Hi Rudolph, 

Thanks for reaching out, we understand that it can seem difficult to find a cosigner at first. Don't worry though, we help people like you every day!

We're a cosigner lender, all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them. A cosigner is a great sign that someone trusts you, and that we should too regardless of your credit history! If your cosigner trusts you, then we will.

A cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor or even a colleague) who is a US resident, has a 750+ credit score and good history of paying their bills on time - someone who owns their home or pays a mortgage is much more likely to be accepted. Remember, as long as you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to make a payment! You might find some useful tips on how to approach finding or speaking to a potential cosigner here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans

When you have found someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/WWEFFSQL - we'd love for your loan to add to the $25million we've already paid out to people just like you. If you still find that you're not able to find a cosigner, please respond to this email with CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else.

Thanks, 
Jade@Transform Credit

(GT - Email - settling loan) [RE:There is a Pending ACH on your Account - 120388CAPS] Hi Kenneth,
 
Your current balance is $4782.04.  
 
To pay off your loan, please follow: https://tcrdt.com/s/CP56WCMY

We will need to receive the funds within 5 working days to honor this figure. After 5 working days, the balance you need to pay will update to include the additional daily accrued interest. This payoff figure also excludes any other changes to the balance that may occur, aside from accrued interest, such as a returned payment.
 
Thanks,
TransformCredit

(AI GT Confirming Payment - Pending payment - GT DD - Arrears Email) [RE: There is a Pending ACH on your Account - 120388CAPS] Hi Kenneth,

There is a pending payment of $195.80, from your bank account. ACH payments can take up to 5 days to clear, at which point the payment will show on your account.

Will this payment be successful? This loan is currently 16 days past due, so if this payment isn't successful it's crucial the account is brought current immediately, to prevent extra interest accruing and avoid further escalation.

You can make a payment immediately here: https://tcrdt.com/s/DU3PCHBU or pay late here: https://tcrdt.com/s/NCWG5TDY

Thanks,
Mia, Transform Credit

(GT - Email - balance and statement of account) [RE:There is a Pending ACH on your Account - 120388CAPS] Hi Kenneth,
 
Your balance as of today is $4782.04. Please bear in mind that we charge our interest daily against the balance, therefore this amount will change on a daily basis.
 
You can access your statement of account any time via this link: https://tcrdt.com/s/906QEZBS
 
If you are looking to settle your loan, please reply  with "settle my loan"
 
Thanks,
TransformCredit

[Your TransformCredit Loan : 120388CAPS] Hi Kenneth,

To settle your loan, download our App https://tcrdt.com/s/N8MP0EPX or go online: https://tcrdt.com/s/CP56WCMY If the pending payment is going to clear, you can deduct that amount.

Funds must be received within five working days to honour the settlement amount and waive off any interest accumulated during this time frame. Otherwise, you will be charged for the account's interest accumulated during the time frame. 

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out. We're here to assist you.

Thanks,
Transform Credit

Your options are to cancel his application or accept it without the deed. Let me know.  This is starting to look like a full blown scam

[Your Together Loans Loan Application : *****************40635] Hi Laureen, 

This is not a full blown scam, nor is it a scam of any kind. Please look us up on Trust Pilot, on our website, and I can give you our financial licenses and you can call the state government, I am sure your attorneys can help vet us as well. The reason we are asking for that is because there is probably not a high enough credit score, and if you show proof that you are a home owner, that shows responsibility for a mortgage and  payments and therefore increases your chances of being a co-signer. All of this is listed on our website as well, we have nothing to hide and are more than willing to answer any of your questions or provide any additional info. We are asking for a title deed, mortgage statement, and or property tax statement to show proof. We would love to help you help Gary, but that is a requirement in your case. So please let us know what you decide to do, if you wish to cancel let us know, Gary is more than welcome to find another co-signer if he wishes. 

Thanks, Together Loans

Thanks for choosing Transform Credit, we have attached your Proposed Credit Contract with this email for you to keep. This does not mean that your application has been approved, but it gives you a chance to read and understand the terms of the agreement. 

Below is a link where you can view/download our free Credit Education Program. You're not required to do anything with this in order to proceed with your application but we do recommend reviewing the content as you may find it helpful.
https://transformcredit.com/credit-education-program

To finalize your application please complete all of the required steps online - https://transformcredit.com/hub?aref=*****************72430 

If you have any questions about our application process please visit our website https://transformcredit.com/faq

Amber @ Transform Credit

[Your Transform CreditBuilder application] Hi James,

                Thanks for choosing Transform CreditBuilder, we have attached your Proposed Credit Contract with this email for you to keep. This does not mean that your loan has been approved, but it gives you a chance to read and understand the terms of the agreement.

[Affordability Confirmation] To James ******,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to charges of criminal fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Information provided to Transform Credit by you:

Borrower: James ******
IP: 76.158.12.27
DateTime (UTC): 02-25-2024
Stated Monthly Income: Full Time Employed $4500
Rent: $800
Bills: $90
Other Expenses: $500
Your Credit Commitments: $395
Transform Credit Repayment: $160.310000
To be safe: $50
Total available after expenditure and this loan repayment: $2504.690000


Yours sincerely
Transform credit Applications Dept

[Your Transform Credit Loan Application Ref: *****************72430] Good afternoon. I know we have started the process for funding this loan.
My co-signer Kodi has decided to just give me the $ amount as a personal
loan from a friend. Can we now cancel the process?I understand if not. I
apologize for the inconvenience but this will work out better for me.

James, your loan has already been sent up, reviewed and approved. You funds will be paid out today. James, this loan will help you build your credit, a loan from a friend will not raise your score. Give us a call so we can talk about how this loan will help you better in the long run. *******
